assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends UNSPECIFIED release channel (manual upgrades only) instead of Stable or Extended release channel

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: The response uses NO_UPGRADES scope which blocks all upgrades including security patches, rather than the more specific 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion that would allow control plane security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: The response configures a 4-hour maintenance window on Sundays (6-10 AM UTC) which is a narrow weekend window

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: The response creates separate node pools: h100-training-primary, h100-training-backup for GPU training workloads, and system-pool for system components, with appropriate taints and tolerations

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: The response explicitly sets autoUpgrade: false on both training node pools and mentions manual upgrade strategy

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: While the response mentions disk configuration for checkpoints, it doesn't explicitly advise configuring training frameworks with checkpointing or explain how jobs can resume after disruption

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: The response mentions GPU driver configuration but doesn't discuss testing GPU driver versions in staging before production deployment

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response doesn't mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking requirements or version compatibility considerations
